name: golang-github-prometheus-sigv4-dev
title: golang-github-prometheus-sigv4-dev
summary: Go http.RoundTripper for signing requests using AWS SigV4 (library)
description:
Go http.RoundTripper for signing requests using AWS SigV4 (library)
sigv4 provides an http.RoundTripper that will sign requests using Amazon
Web Service's (AWS) Signature Version 4, using credentials from the
default AWS credential chain.
